label: Younger/transplant-eligible proxy distinct-person denominator
notes: Age <=65 is a younger proxy, not full transplant eligibility.

label: Data points with aggregate person counts
notes: Counts are aggregate distinct-person feasibility counts.

label: Data points unavailable or failed
notes: Unavailable counts carry explicit mapping, credential, or query-error statuses.

label: Small-cell suppressed count rows
notes: Exact counts below the configured threshold are not displayed.

label: Production aggregate query errors
notes: Failed queries remain production-mode failures and do not fall back to plan mode.

label: Zero counts requiring value-mapping review
notes: A zero with uncertain value semantics is not treated as clinical absence.

label: Waterfall steps
notes: Progressive inclusion counts for feasibility only.

label: Overlap matrix cells
notes: Pairwise/domain overlaps; not a causal design.
